verdict_reason: No known-vulnerable versions introduced; the concern is unrelated drift bundled into a feature PR rather than the resolved versions themselves

todos.issue: The lockfile carries far more than the two declared bumps — body-parser, js-yaml, brace-expansion, fast-uri, immutable, shell-quote, svgo and @hapi/tlds all drift, and hapi-pulse's nested joi 17 tree is removed — none of it verified by this PR's tests
todos.fix: Regenerate the lockfile from a clean install on the dependency-only PR so the search PR's lock diff is limited to what the feature needs
